transfer_rule.flow_edges: sum source-sink path weights over each chamber-orientation edge
transfer_rule.path_weight: tensor_path_coefficient_mass_sum divided by one plus Poincare hyperbolic path length
transfer_rule.return_kernel: close the acyclic flow by returning from sink 44 to sources 10 and 43 in proportion to total source path weight
transfer_rule.stationary_measure: unique stationary distribution of the closed row-stochastic transfer matrix
